title: Luminous Power Technologies is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Luminous Power Technologies is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Quality Control Engineer looking for your next big career move? Luminous Power Technologies in Pune offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Luminous Power Technologies:
Luminous Power Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Luminous Power Technologies!
